title: Transitions & Animations
content:
### Transition Utilities Tailwind provides transition utilities for smooth state changes: ```html
/* transition-property: all */
/* transition: all */
/* color, bg, border-color */
/* opacity */
/* box-shadow */
/* transform */ ``` ### Transition Duration Control how long a transition takes: ```html
/* 75ms */
/* 100ms */
/* 300ms (default) */
/* 500ms */
/* 700ms */
/* 1000ms */ ``` ### Transition Timing Function ```html
/* linear */
/* cubic-bezier: in */
/* cubic-bezier: out */
/* cubic-bezier: in-out */ ``` ### Transition Delay ```html
/* 100ms delay */
/* 500ms delay */
/* 1000ms delay */ ``` ### Animation Utilities ```html
/* infinite spin */
/* ping/pulse effect */
/* pulse/fade effect */
/* bounce effect */
/* no animation */ ``` ### Practical Examples ```html
Scale on hover
``` ### Custom Animations Define custom animations in `tailwind.config.js`: ```js module.exports = { theme: { extend: { keyframes: { wiggle: { '0%, 100%': { transform: 'rotate(-3deg)' }, '50%': { transform: 'rotate(3deg)' }, }, }, animation: { wiggle: 'wiggle 1s ease-in-out infinite', }, }, }, } ``` Usage: `
`
codeExample:
Hover
Bounce
Pulse

quiz.question: Which utility creates a smooth transition specifically for color, background, and border-color?
How do you add a custom animation keyframe in Tailwind?
options: Using keyframes and animation in theme.extend
